description: Discover the latest in beauty and personal care with our email template that announces a thrilling expansion in our services. Perfect for ecommerce retailers in the health and wellness industry, this template is designed to engage your audience with exciting updates about your natural hair and skin care range. Whether you're introducing a new product set or expanding your retail outlets, this template will effectively communicate your growth, emphasizing your commitment to providing top-tier, healthy beauty solutions. Ideal for businesses committed to promoting natural, personal care products, this template will keep your customers informed and excited about your brand's journey.
short_description: Discover our email template tailored for ecommerce retailers in health, wellness, and beauty care. Perfect for announcing exciting expansions, new natural hair and skin care products, or retail growth. Engage your audience with this effective communication tool.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
